summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nova AI iteration 5 - Real backend implementation with JWT authentication and MongoDB integration. All backend APIs and frontend integration working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/)
Admin login with admin@nova.ai / admin123 returns JWT token
Login with wrong password returns 401
User registration creates new user and returns token
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user data
GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Waitlist signup stores email in MongoDB
GET /api/agents returns 6 agents from database
GET /api/agents?category=sales returns filtered sales agents
GET /api/agents?search=Customer returns matching agents
GET /api/agents/1 returns Customer Service Pro details
GET /api/agents/1/reviews returns reviews for agent 1
GET /api/creators returns 5 creators
GET /api/creators/cxmaster returns creator with agents
Frontend home page loads with waitlist form working
Frontend login with admin@nova.ai / admin123 redirects to /studio
Frontend login with wrong credentials shows error handling
Marketplace loads agents from API (not hardcoded data)
Category filtering on marketplace makes API calls
Search functionality filters results via API
Agent detail page /agent/1 fetches from API and shows details
Creator profile /creator/cxmaster fetches from API
Live demo functionality working with chat simulation
Auth state persistence after page refresh (JWT in localStorage)
Protected routes accessible only after authentication
Navigation between all pages working correctly
